description: Half-elemental mortals whose skin, hair, and temperament betray the raw power of the Inner Planes.
subraces: Air Genasi
Breeze-touched wanderers with windswept hair, holding their breath indefinitely.
Earth Genasi
Stone-skinned stoics with crystalline veins, shrugging off tremors and standing immovable.
Fire Genasi
Flame-haired hot-bloods with ember eyes, radiating heat and igniting when angered.
Water Genasi
Blue-skinned swimmers with wave-like hair, breathing underwater and commanding tides.
Ice Para-Genasi
Frost-veined hybrids born of air and water, leaving rime on everything they touch.
Magma Para-Genasi
Molten-skinned brutes born of fire and earth, radiating searing heat from cracked skin.
Ooze Para-Genasi
Slick, damp-skinned hybrids of water and earth seeping through cracks like living mud.
Smoke Para-Genasi
Haze-wreathed drifters born of fire and air -- half-visible and perpetually choking.
Lightning Genasi
Spark-charged live wires crackling with static and shorting out anything they grip.
Dust Para-Genasi
Dry, ashen wanderers born of earth and air whose touch withers plants and cracks stone.
